title: bitwarden maps all SDK errors to Backend (no Unavailable)
description: SecretsManagerError is a private type in bitwarden-sdk so all SDK errors are caught as opaque dyn Error and mapped to SecretError::Backend (permanent). Network timeouts, DNS failures, and rate-limiting are transient but will never signal Unavailable, so callers who retry on Unavailable will give up permanently on the first transient failure. Needs to inspect the error string or downcast to map recoverable failures to Unavailable.
